description_long: This object is a classic single-propeller military fighter airplane, reminiscent of World War II designs such as the Supermarine Spitfire. It features a streamlined fuselage with a rounded nose, a prominent bubble canopy cockpit, and elliptical low-mounted wings with visible ailerons and flaps. The aircraft is painted in a dark camouflage scheme with distinctive roundel insignia and alphanumeric markings on the fuselage sides. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer with slight dihedral. The landing gear is in a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel.
description: A dark, vintage single-propeller fighter airplane with elliptical low wings, bubble canopy, and military insignia. Features a taildragger landing gear and streamlined WWII-era design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elliptical wingspan, propeller, and bubble canopy centered above the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the roundel insignia, alphanumeric markings, and the propeller's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective with visible cockpit canopy, tail markings, and propeller details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight elliptical wings with no visible winglets and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
